creator: vvelox@vvelox.net
text:
This can no longer be found on CPAN.

If you check the link listed in the pkg-desc, you will find "http://search.cpan.org/dist/MediaWiki/" does not pull up a module named "MediaWiki". It just pulls up a search for it, indicating it was not found.

How-To-Repeat: 

[root@vixen42]/arc/src/ports/www/p5-MediaWiki# make fetch
===>  Vulnerability check disabled, database not found
===>  License check disabled, port has not defined LICENSE
=> MediaWiki-1.13.tar.gz doesn't seem to exist in /arc/src/distfiles/.
=> Attempting to fetch from ftp://ftp.cpan.org/pub/CPAN/modules/by-module/../../authors/id/S/SP/SPECTRUM//.
fetch: ftp://ftp.cpan.org/pub/CPAN/modules/by-module/../../authors/id/S/SP/SPECTRUM//MediaWiki-1.13.tar.gz: File unavailable (e.g., file not found, no access)
=> Attempting to fetch from http://www.cpan.dk/modules/by-module/../../authors/id/S/SP/SPECTRUM//.
fetch: http://www.cpan.dk/modules/by-module/../../authors/id/S/SP/SPECTRUM//MediaWiki-1.13.tar.gz: Not Found
